title: Peppa My First Tablet - Electronic Playset Kids Toy Tablet - Interactive Sound Learning Role Play Set For Children - 9 Buttons 2 Slidey Features – Batteries Included
features: 🐷 INTERACTIVE PEPPA TABLET: Tap into 9 fun sound buttons and 2 engaging sliders featuring Peppa sounds and effects — great for early learning and pretend play
🎀 HELPS DEVELOP MOTOR SKILLS: Designed to improve fine motor control and hand-eye coordination through toddler-friendly press-and-slide actions
🐷 PERFECT SIZE FOR LITTLE HANDS: Measures 18cm x 14cm — ideal for toddlers to hold, play with, and pack for on-the-go fun or quiet time at home
🎀 REALISTIC DESIGN WITH PEPPA FUN: Features a pretend screen, Wi-Fi and battery icons, and moving Peppa artwork — one slider plays music and makes Peppa dance behind the screen
🐷 READY TO GIFT WITH BATTERIES INCLUDED: Comes in a bright Peppa themed gift box with 2 x AAA batteries pre-installed — ready for instant fun
🎀 SAFE DURABLE BUILD: Made from high-quality plastic with rounded edges and colourful buttons designed for daily toddler use and lasting entertainment
description: Discover learning fun with Peppa’s My First Tablet — an interactive toddler toy designed to entertain and educate with lights, sounds, and engaging characters. Perfectly sized at 18cm x 14cm , this Peppa Pig learning tablet fits comfortably in small hands and keeps children aged 18 months+ engaged for hours. With 9 colourful sound buttons and 2 fun slider features , each press activates Peppa-themed sounds to help develop listening skills, symbol recognition, and basic cause-and-effect understanding. The toy includes thoughtful design details like pretend Wi-Fi and battery icons , a realistic screen, and Peppa Pig graphics that come to life — including a special slider that plays music while making Peppa move behind the screen like she’s dancing along! Whether you're encouraging motor skill development or just offering joyful, Peppa-themed fun, this tablet is a great choice for toddlers. It’s made from durable, child-safe plastic and arrives in a bright, Peppa-branded gift box. Plus, with 2 x AAA batteries included , it’s ready to go right out of the packaging. Give your little one the joy of Peppa and the benefits of early learning — all in one fun-filled tablet.
